sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap_data AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bitmap_data = bitmapBuild([32,33,34]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_data, toUInt32(5), toUInt32(15))) AS subset FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_data, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(32))) AS full_subset FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 1;
